title: lithodora calabra
intro: Lithodora calabra, also known as 'Greece Blue', is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and delicate, bell-shaped appearance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Lithodora calabra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Lithodora calabra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for convenient and targeted use of its medicinal properties.
